instruction: You are a vegan customer (User ID: customer_006), placing an order for a friend who is allergic to nuts. You pointed at two dishes in the category at the bottom of the leftmost column of the menu. Please ask the AI service agent to check whether the dish on the right contains nut allergens. Ask the AI service agent to determine: if the dish contains nuts, then ask the AI service agent to find a high-fiber meal with the lowest calorie count in the section at the very top of the right leaflet and add it to the order. If there are multiple meals tied for the lowest calorie count among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to pick a non-dairy dish with the highest price within the first white rounded box on the left leaflet and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Then, ask the AI service agent to check whether the last dish you pointed at has a butter flavor. Ask the AI service agent to determine: if it has a butter flavor, then ask the AI service agent to set the order quantity for this dish to two portions and add it to the order. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total amount payable for the current order after discounts.

instruction: You are a fitness coach (User ID: customer_007) creating a meal plan for a client. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find a herbal-flavored food with the lowest price in the section with a smaller size in the bottom right corner and add it to the order. Subsequently, ask the AI Service Agent to check the price of the pointed meal item located on the left. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if its price exceeds 80 yuan, then ask the AI Service Agent to remove the dish with the highest calories from the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax payable for your final order.
